action: Reconcile accepted additive continuity records with canonical queue state through a deterministic, reviewable, non-mutating projection.

completed_slice.verification: 5 Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical committed source and test content.
completed_slice.finding: Canonical queue items and additive proposals are separate state layers; a deterministic projection can expose both without inventing canonical adoption.

acceptance_test: Equivalent inputs produce the same projection digest; foreign-team and mutation-claiming updates are rejected; duplicate and canonical-overlap proposals are flagged; ACTIVE_QUEUE.json remains untouched.
privacy_boundary: Public repository files, commit metadata, abstract coordination state, and deterministic digests only; no private chat, health material, credentials, identifying personal data, or unreviewed uploads.
next_action: Add a repository workflow that runs the reconciler over reviewed continuity queue updates and emits a signed or commit-bound projection artifact for explicit human or policy adoption.
